page_desc: Whether you want to start a business yourself, or you are an organisation helping others do it — we have a programme for you.
individuals_heading: A step-by-step path to starting your business.
individuals_desc: Our programmes are for people who are done thinking about starting and ready to actually do it. Most of our participants are busy. They have jobs, families, and limited time. Our structure is built around that reality.
accelerator_desc: Learn everything you need to start a business — on your own time, at your own pace. Pre-recorded video lessons that walk you through every step, from testing your idea to getting your first paying client.
dwy_desc: Build your business with an experienced founder right beside you. This is hands-on. You will be coached, challenged, and held to account every week — from your first idea through to your first paying client.
organisations_desc: We partner with universities, local authorities, government agencies, charities, prisons, and corporate organisations to deliver structured business education to people at the earliest stages of enterprise.
partners_heading: Clear delivery. Measurable results. Proper reporting.
cta_heading: Ready to talk about a programme for your community?
cta_desc: Tell us who you are trying to help, what you want to achieve, and when you need it. We will come back to you with a proposal.
